case_title: MIMI CUI MEI LI VS. JOHN WILLIAM CURTIN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, MIMI CUI MEI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COURTNEY, SHANE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,557.54 FILED BY LI, MIMI CUI MEI AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIN, JOHN WILLIAM DUBLIN, RONAN THOMAS COURTNEY, SHANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AT SMALL CLAIMS HEARING; FILED BY DEFENDANT COURTNEY, SHANE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY LI, MIMI CUI MEI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, MIMI CUI MEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CURTIN, JOHN WILLIAM DUBLIN, RONAN THOMAS COURTNEY, SHANE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR DAMAGES TO THE HOME THAT EXCEED THE SECURITY DEPORIT ALREADY RETAINED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APPEAR AT SMALL CLAIMS HEARING BY TELEPHONE-REQUEST IS GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT SHANE COURTNEY AND HIS WITNESSES APPEAR BY TELEPHONE(COURT CALL). ALL PARTIES SWORN. DEFENDANT STIPULATES VERBALLY TO HAVING JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD HEARING CASE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
